column1: Hey John, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy here with SpringBreak U
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options for that week
Cool I got you. Which destination were you lookin to book?
Bett that's where I'll be too. I'm there every year
How many ppl in your group so far?
That's a solid bro. You all from the same school!
We'd prob fly out of dc
Fire we had a couple groups from there last year. I'll def hook it up for you
Yea I'll show you some options that include flights and the option without fights. Sometimes you save money getting them separately but it's def more convenient to do it all in one
Le gustó “Yea I'll show you some options that include flights and the option without fights. Sometimes you save money getting them separately but it's def more convenient to do it all in one”
putting this info together for you right now, how soon were you looking to get things started?
In terms of booking? Or just seeing the packages you offer?
Im only sending packages over right now
I was more so asking if your group is looking to book things soon, just so I know how what payment plan works best
Depending on if we prefer booking with you guys we'd be willing to book things before the end of the month
got you, makes sense. just keep in mind prices do change pretty quickly as time goes on
cool if I send it though it through email?
dope whats the best email to send to
just sent that over lmk if you got it
word, im gonna reply to the thread with the flight price options
Sent that over btw, as a reply to the initial email
Out of curiosity. Is riu republica 21+ over spring break ?
Yea, they usually require everyone to be 21 during bring break
did you want to check it out?
whats good bro hows the squad feelin about the options so far
What's bro yeah we liked the occidental PC 4 night package we're just waiting to hear back from one other agency
bet that. were you looking at another destination with the other agency? or more so just pricing
I'm down to work with you and get the best package possible for wherever. we have some flexibility and I'm down to help
For sure bro. Yeah mostly just pricing given basically everyone does similar resorts and party packages
I hear you, we typically cater to all of the college friendly resorts. theres only a handful of them
typically the differentiator between companies other than the price, is mostly the care and customer service. super important when traveling internationally especially with a big group
if you do see anything cheaper or a package that you feel fits your vibe more, let me know and I'll do what we can to match it or get you a better deal
Sounds good man I will definitely reach back and let you know.
Is the price subject to change change depending on people in group?
Sup bro upon consideration we think we're gonna book hotels and flights somewhere else but we would like to purchase the party pack with you guys. Is that possible?
what's good bro yea I can hook it up with a party pass. What dates did you end up booking and which hotel?
bet that, I can hook it up with the $200 party ass bundle. comes with 4 events - Imagine Cave, Coco Bongo, Maroca, and the Booze Cruise
comes with coach bus transportation, express entry, cover charge, and open bar
Nah that actually seems good lol
yea its a steal bro each of these events individually would cost over 300
this was imagine cave last spring https://youtu.be/RXvcdVqvARU
think I make a vid appearance in that lowkey lol
Yeah that's sick. I'm gonna follow up with you soon after I get everyone on the same boat yall offering a great deal

For sure. Also side question I know that week we're going isn't the most popular for spring break but yall are still running trips there that week. Will the resort be a lot more dead compared to later weeks?
I wouldnt say dead, your week is still a good week there will be college students on the resort an you're still gonna have a good time
I've seen more come in for the week after, but tbh all 3 weeks are peak weeks for the resorts in general
Have you gotten decent amount of bookings for that week
And for the party package we decided on 1 - 5 because those were the dates agencies were doing. Would those be the best dates to go overall because agencies going those days?
yea 100% bro, did you want me to set up the party pass reservation?
sup bro, you still lookin to get the party pass?
whats good bro how we lookin

What's up bro I know it's been a while but turns out it's tuff getting 15+ people to agree to the same thing. I have 18 people ready to book and atleast 15 ready to book the party package. Can we get the link to that? I know it hasn't been the smoothest process but it's harder than expected to get college guys to party in DR. We have atleast 15 people interested in. Using the 200$ package you mentioned.
yooo whats good bro. all good, lets get y'all rollin
so we got 18 ready, and 15 out of the 18 want to add the $200 bundle
I remember you had a few that booked already right? or are we doing the full package (resort, transportation, onsite staff, parties, etc) for everyone. I can chef up whichever you need just lmk
Is it a link? Easier for everyone to just do it themselves
yoo whats good bro, I missed your message somehow
yea I'll send the link over right now. 18 slots?
also bro just checked and the $200 4 event bundle is actually not valid anymore. gonna see what I can finesse for you
yo so I was able to get 3 events for $200. the event options are: Booze cruise, Imagine Cave, Coco Bongo, and Maroca
Any preference on which 3 we want to do? I'd recommend Imagine, Booze Cruise, and Coco Bongo. all 3 together individually really costs $240
thats actually a great point bro we'll have to go with the 3 events that are avail throughout your time there

the full sched isnt out yet, but there will 100% be 3 o the 4 events happening between the 1st and 5th. Imagine Cave 100%, it typically falls on a monday, booze cruise usually happens twice in the week between tue, weds and thu, and coco bongo is typically tue or weds
so if we do the 3 event pass its actually better for you than the original 4, because one event could fall on a night you're not there
those three events tho (Booze Cruise, Imagine, Coco Bongo) are always stacked at the top of the week because everyone travels in the 28th, 1st, and 2nd
So how much is the 4 event package
Because yeah we'll be there from 1-5th
Is this price subject to change again due to time or more/less people buying

to be honest these are bundle prices that I've gotten approved for you by our ops team. most other travelers are purchasing these events as individual tickets. all 4 if purchased individually add up to $308
those prices dont change, but my ability to dish out the bundle discount, at somepint I won't be able to do anymore
Do the tickets just cover entrance?
Nahh comes with round trip coach bus transportation from Occ Punta Cana, express entry, cover charge, and open bar
we can do less nights if you want to spend less?
No just was asking for the 4 events. Can we get the link for it?
yea no prob bro, I'll get that started now
just emailed it all over. will text it here too, the email has a better breakdown on how each person gets on and navigates through the reservation
I split the payment up into two for y'all. so there's two installments so you dont have to pay it all at once upfront
Sounds good man thank you. Will get back to you asap
John whats good bro, how we lookin?
yooo brodie did we plan on locking in that party pass reservation? ops team is asking me to close it down if not
Yeah we are planning on it just haven't gotten able to rally everyone but it is going to happen but that's why I asked if there's a time constraint I know it won't be instantly
got you. when do you think you'd get everyone together? I just gotta get ops team off my back about it lol
word bro, i'll put the word in with them
sup John hope break went smoothly! We lookin to lock that party pass down?
yerr whats good bro, we still lookin to grab this party package?
Yup it's still on the agenda we won't be fading this
word. I'ma have to close the reservation for now tho if we're not looking to lock in today / tomorrow
ops team been on my back lol
We would all have to book by today/tomorrow??
are there some people that needed more time? we can always add to it when theyre ready
whats good John, we ready to lock down these passes?
whats up John did y'all still need help with spring break or you all set?
yoo John did y'all get to book anything for spring break yet
yo John wanted to make sure I didnt miss you! is spring break still a thing for y'all or not anymore
Hey man. How much more would it cost if we were to buy today ?
Yo! Was it a party pass you were lookin to to?
Yessirr but no booze cruise we ended up doing that some place else
Word. And this was Punta Cana right, you want to do a 3 night party pass?
bet! thats gonna be $237 per person. lmk and I'll get the link sent over
Yeah can you send link please
Preciate it, what day is each event?
Maroca Nightclub March 2, Imagine Cave March 3, Coco Bongo March 4
Out of curiosity what determines the days for each spot? Is it a cost thing?
Like why those days for those clubs. Why isn't for example coco bongo on the 3rd and imagine on like the 1st or any different order?
These are designated hosted nights where there will be all spring break travelers. These clubs aren't like regularly open
But the others aren't regularly open daily
I see what you mean. So the hosted nights you can only get in if it's through an agency like yall
not like a general pubic night where people are waking up
I see. And do a lot of other agencies go on this night? Not asking bc I'd go inquire elsewhere just trying to see if it'd even be a good night to go and actually worth the money.
yea there will be other travelers going for sure. I'd say its better than just staying on the resort at night in my opinion
Gotu and at the clubs it's not premium open bar options just the normal open bar options right
yoo John whats good bro, how things lookin on your end?
They're looking good we're probably gonna purchase soon a lot of us are in
Is that cool? Not all of us have to buy by tonight right?
yea youre good, just keep me posted. those open slots will expire at some point
Yeah some of us already paid. We don't have to put out passport number right? I don't know why it asks that.
nah skip that, thats for our travelers that have their full package through us
whats good fam just checkin in on the squad
Pretty sure it says the link is closing today so we should be getting in all those payments today
gotcha. lmk if you need anything through the day
yoyo, still have 3 open slots on there. did you still need those?
Nah I think everyone that bought are the ones going.
Okay bet so I'll delete those open slots
Whatsup man Is there like a groupchat you guys have for everyone that booked with yall in Occidental?
lol nah that group chat would be insane
Lmaoo I was just thinking like an announcements thing where they give a heads up about buses coming and leaving and what not
you'll get all that on site when you check in with our onsite staff to get your tickets
did y'all get the email I sent over yesterday
Did yall get a good amount of people to Occidental PC
yea def a good amount of groups. its gonna be a dope experience bro. I get there as soon as you leave tho unfort. would be dope to meet y'all
Yeah I just want there to be mad college kids don't want it to be dead lol
But I saw to hotel was almost fully booked so that's a good sign
Maroca Nightclub March 2, Imagine Cave March 3, Coco Bongo March 4
yessir theres also a coco bongo option for March 1
So we can chose to go either the first or the fourth?
it will more than likely be assigned to y'all during check in. the one on the 1st is mostly for ppl that leave before the night of the fourth
Okay yeah we leave the fifth and wanna go the fourth
bet yea most will go the 4th
Le gustó “bet yea most will go the 4th”
You have me the wrong dates man coco is tn and th 5th
just slide tn tho bro gonna be lit
I mean that's a big difference from what you told us bro we had things planned for tonight.
so y'all not gonna go tn?
things change on site on the fly my man. it was sched for the 4th just yesterday
